news.t: The Strategy Shares Nasdaq 7HANDL Index ETF (HNDL) Crosses the $1 Billion Asset Threshold
Strategy Shares Nasdaq 7HANDL™ Index ETF (HNDL) Celebrates Three-Year Anniversary with Highest Morningstar Rating
Strategy Shares Nasdaq 7HANDL™ Index ETF (HNDL) Surpasses $100 Million in Assets Under Management

overview.description: The Strategy Shares Nasdaq 7HANDL Index ETF (HNDL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq 7HANDL Base index. The fund is a fund of funds that targets a high distribution rate. The funds index reflects a balanced portfolio of US equities, fixed income, and alternative investments HNDL was launched on Jan 17, 2018 and is issued by Strategy Shares.
